# mujii.dev

> Portfolio of Mujtaba Shahid (Mujii) — BSc Data & Cybersecurity student at UDST
> (University of Doha for Science and Technology), focused on penetration
> testing, zero-trust architecture, and secure software development. Based in
> Doha, Qatar. Currently completing the CEH v13 certification.

Canonical URL: https://mujii.dev/

## Sections

- Profile (#about) — background, focus areas, current status
- Selected work (#projects) — security and software projects with source links
- Trajectory (#experience) — work history and education timeline
- Arsenal (#skills) — tools, languages, and security frameworks
- Dossier (#cv) — downloadable CV and certifications
- Contact (#contact) — email, phone, GitHub, LinkedIn

## Key projects

- Decentralized Zero Trust Proxy for MCP — github.com/mujii974/DZT-Proxy-for-MCP
- Hospital Management System — github.com/mujii974/Hospital-Management-System
- Battleship: CryptoCracks — github.com/mujii974/Battleship_CryptoCracks
